case_title: PAIGE DANIELSON VS. MING LEE ET AL

docket_entries.description: REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES. IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE FACTS , NOT CONCLUSIONS, GIVING RISE TO THE REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. SUCH FACTS SHALL BE ALLEGED WITH REQUISITE PARTICULARITY SHOWING THAT THE MOVING DEFENDANT ACTED WITH A CONSCIOUS DISREGARD OF PLAINTIFF'S RIGHTS. JUDGE CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: N. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-14-2021 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-12-2020 Set For Trial On Jun-28-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Strike Punitive Damages
Off Calendar Aug-26-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant's Motion to Strike Punitive Damages. is GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts , not conclusions, giving rise to the request for punitive damages. Such facts shall be alleged with requisite particularity showing that the moving defendant acted with a conscious disregard of plaintiff's rights. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
